library_preparation_preflight.summary: Meaningful use of jsonschema-module-jackson requires the core jsonschema-generator API; the module declares jsonschema-generator and Jackson APIs as provided and is normally used by registering JacksonModule with SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder.

deterministic_setup.reason:
The module's documented usage instantiates JacksonModule and passes it to SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder, and the artifact's POM declares com.github.victools:jsonschema-generator as a provided dependency rather than a transitive runtime dependency. Adding the aligned core generator also brings the Jac
...[truncated]

library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required. Tests should exercise JacksonModule through SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder/SchemaGenerator with sample classes using Jackson annotations such as @JsonProperty, @JsonIgnore, @JsonPropertyDescription, @JsonSubTypes, or @JsonUnwrapped, rather than only instantiating module classes.
risks: Without the core generator dependency, generated tests can only reach superficial module APIs and meaningful schema-generation coverage is unlikely.
Jackson annotations are provided indirectly through the core generator dependency's Jackson transitive dependencies; local Gradle verification remains authoritative.
